phase0_diagnosis.root_cause: Orchestrator safety gate returned before spawning JasonOS_Prime_MaterializedQaIncidentProbe because Sentinel/control-plane state was not eligible; the queue job was marked done but request file stayed queued, so section5_uncapped_index_snapshot_status.json remained stale.

fix_staged.change: Added markMaterializedProbeRequestsHeld() and call sites so queued Section 5/materialized request files are marked HELD_* when pause, Sentinel, or launch-health gates hold the worker.

service_reload.reason: Not restarted while Sentinel/control-plane status is ALERT/HIGH; restarting core control plane during alert would increase risk.

next_required_action: When Sentinel is PASS/LOW or REVIEW/MEDIUM and core launch health is stable, restart or reload JasonOS_Prime_Orchestrator so the source patch becomes active, then re-run section5_uncapped_index_snapshot and verify the request file becomes HELD_* if the safety gate blocks or PASS_* with a current artifact if it runs.
